title: Ez Backpacks
description: Wearable vanilla-style backpacks with custom slots, portable storage, seasonal events, and colorful upgrades!
body:
# Ez Backpacks

Ez Backpacks adds colorful wearable backpacks with portable storage, custom inventory slots, seasonal events, and immersive vanilla-style mechanics to Minecraft!

Designed to feel like a natural part of Minecraft survival, Ez Backpacks gives players early-game portable storage before shulker boxes, while keeping balanced progression and fun quality-of-life features.

## Features

* **Wearable Backpacks**

  * Equip backpacks in a dedicated backpack slot
  * Backpacks appear on the player’s back
  * Open backpacks directly with the B key
  * Shift-click support for quick equipping

* **Portable Storage**

  * Normal backpacks with 27 slots
  * Large backpacks with 54 slots
  * Keep stored items when broken, similar to shulker boxes
  * Place backpacks in the world with Shift + Right Click
  * Open backpacks from your hand or while placed

* **Color Variants**

  * Backpacks available in all Minecraft colors
  * Colored backpack inventories and tooltips
  * Separate textures and models for normal and large variants

* **Seasonal Easter Eggs**

  * Christmas backpacks during December 25–31
  * Easter bunny backpacks during Easter
  * Halloween pumpkin backpacks during Halloween
  * Seasonal variants work as items, blocks, and worn backpacks

* **Backpack Upgrades**

  * Special backpack upgrades with unique mechanics
  * Redstone backpacks can interact with redstone-powered blocks

* **Survival-Friendly**

  * Recipe unlocking support
  * Advancement: Packed and Ready!
  * Prevents backpacks and shulker boxes from being stored inside backpacks
  * Balanced for survival gameplay

* **Full Language Support**

  * Fully translated into every Minecraft language
  * Includes LOLCAT and Pirate Speak

Ez Backpacks focuses on polish, immersion, and vanilla-style gameplay while expanding Minecraft’s storage system in a fun and creative way.
